{{CargoRelic
|name=Lucky Horseshoe
|class_id=20957
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The magical lucky horseshoe, typically forged into a crescent shape, symbolizes the ancient Greek goddess of hunting and the moon, Artemis. It is said that only when it is nailed above a door with the open end facing upwards, can it bring good fortune…
|fame=31
|art=13
|fth=15
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +1<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
